nasb.text: She treats her young cruelly, as if they were not hers; Though her labor be in vain, she is unconcerned;

esv.text: She deals cruelly with her young, as if they were not hers; though her labor be in vain, yet she has no fear,

cnv.text: 牠苛待幼雛，看牠們好像不是自己生的， 就算牠的勞苦白費了，也漠不關心，

ccb.text: 它苛待雏鸟，好像它们并非己出， 就算徒劳一场，它也不怕。
